channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: This Is Probably Your Last Chance to Buy a Cheap MacBook for a While
item.description: Apple has dramatically jacked up the price of MacBooks, making the current Prime Day pricing that much more enticing.

item.title: ‘Never let the builder be its own reviewer’: The next challenge is trust, not speed of code generation
item.description: AI coding platforms are becoming crucial infrastructure, but governance, verification and trust are now major challenges.

item.title: Consider this your sign to finally start that new PC build project — MSI has two excellent motherboard deals in Amazon's Prime Day sale
item.description: One for AMD’s Ryzen platform, one for Intel — both with Wi-Fi built in and both significantly cheaper than usual.

item.title: I'm an Xbox Series X owner, and these are the games that are keeping me coming back right now
item.description: The Xbox games to watch over the Amazon Prime Day sale.

item.title: Mac et iPad | Apple augmente ses prix de plusieurs centaines de dollars d’un coup
item.description: La ruée vers l’intelligence artificielle a des conséquences bien réelles pour les clients d’Apple : ils devront payer plus cher pour se procurer leur prochain Mac ou leur prochain iPad.

item.title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
item.description: penAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of to the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.

item.title: Liquid AI's smallest model yet LFM2.5-230M beats models 4X its size at data extraction, can run 'anywhere'
item.description: Liquid AI, founded by former MIT computer scientists, today released its smallest AI language model yet, LFM2.5-230M, and enterprises would do well to consider it for their uses in data extraction and local deployment on smartphones, laptops and robotics.This is a 230-million-parameter foundation model explicitly designed for on-device agentic workflows, and as Liquid states in its release blog post, that small size makes it possible to run nearly "anywhere." According to Liquid, it also outperforms models more than 4X its size on selected benchmarks, specifically doing better at data extracti...

item.title: How to watch Paraguay vs Australia: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time for the battle to finish second in Group D at FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Here's how to watch Paraguay vs Australia for free online and from anywhere in a crucial Group D fixture at the FIFA World Cup 2026.

item.title: Lenovo debuts curious mini PC that comes with a proprietary 'store' where you can buy up to 8000 different AI skills — is this the future of computing?
item.description: Lenovo's AI Host Mini combines dedicated AI hardware with a proprietary marketplace offering more than 8000 downloadable AI skills.

item.title: Why Amazon Dropped Its OpenAI Movie, Data Center Workers Fight Back, and Meta Leaks Employee Data
item.description: Amazon-owned MGM Studios’ decision to drop the OpenAI movie is just part of AI and film industries becoming increasingly intertwined. On Uncanny Valley, we take a look at where this is all headed.

item.title: How to watch Turkey vs USA: Free Streams, TV Channels & Kick-Off time as FIFA World Cup 2026 co-hosts eye perfect group-stage campaign
item.description: Here's how to watch Turkey vs USA for free online and from anywhere at the FIFA World Cup 2026, as the co-hosts aim to continue their perfect start.

item.title: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
item.description: Amazon’s Prime Day is now in its third day, and whether you’re looking for a new pair of wireless earbuds or a smartwatch, there’s a good chance you’ll find a discount. The Apple Watch Series 11 has already dropped to a new low price, while the AirPods Pro 3 are discounted to $179. With Apple […]

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Friday, June 26 (game #1614)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Friday, June 26 (game #845)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Friday, June 26 (game #1111)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: The MSI Vision ZS is a potent combo of Ryzen 7 9800X3D and RTX 5070 in a stunning pre-built — and it’s $510 off for Prime Day
item.description: I'm calling it now - this is the best CPU and GPU combination in an eye-catching chassis.

item.title: OpenAI will initially only release ChatGPT 5.6 to government-approved customers
item.description: So much for voluntary review.

item.title: My dad needed a new big-screen TV — this Prime Day deal was my top recommendation and saved him $500
item.description: Shopping for a new big-screen TV? My recommendation is LG's top-rated 77-inch B5 OLED TV, on sale at Best Buy for its lowest price ever at $1,399.99.

item.title: Android 17’s new foldable gaming mode could make flippy phones more fun
item.description: Android 17 is getting a dedicated gaming mode for foldables that will put a virtual gamepad with touch controls on half of your screen to theoretically make it easier to play games. With foldable gaming mode, which is set to launch in the coming months, the virtual controller emulates physical button presses at a system […]

item.title: 99 Prime Day Deals That Aren’t For Suckers, Up to 50% Off (2026)
item.description: We've gone from A to Z to find Amazon's best Prime Day deals on the gear worth owning.

item.title: Venezuela’s Powerful Earthquakes Were a Rare ‘Seismic Doublet’
item.description: The country was hit hard by a pair of quakes that happened in quick succession and were likely driven by stress being transferred from one part of the fault that runs through the country to another.

item.title: I switched to Logitech’s ergonomic keyboard and mouse to minimize wrist strain, and I won’t ever go back to conventional desk accessories
item.description: Wrist pain while working? Logitech’s ergonomic keyboard and mouse helped alleviate my suffering — and both products are on sale now.
